top.title: Massive Russian attack on cities across Ukraine kills at least nine people
top.summary: Kyiv Mayor Vitali Klitschko says two high-rise apartment buildings have been hit and there are fears people are trapped under rubble.

top.title: Lebanon says Hezbollah agrees reciprocal halt to attacks on Israel
top.summary: Hours after the pause was announced, the Israeli military said it had intercepted projectiles fired from Lebanon.

top.title: Bowen: Trump needs this war to end but Iran is not backing down
top.summary: Under pressure from the polls and Gulf allies, the White House is pushing for a deal but Iran wants concessions, writes BBC's international editor.

top.title: How 'confused' AI rollout hurts firms and baffles staff
top.summary: Some firms are putting pressure on staff to use AI, but have not thought through their AI rollout.

top.title: OpenAI let ChatGPT aid and abet mass shooters, Florida lawsuit claims
top.summary: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier alleges OpenAI and boss Sam Altman built a 'web of deceit'

top.title: UK banks blocked from cyber AI tool Mythos get offer from rival OpenAI
top.summary: Nine banks have been offered access to GPT 5.5 Cyber, as fierce rival Anthropic has blocked previews of its tool.

title.#text: The Google Pixel Watch 5 may have been spoiled by… the creator of Borderlands
Pebblebee’s Halo can help track lost items and keep you safe, and it’s on sale for $50
This could be Windows’ M1 moment — but expect it to cost a ton
